title: 22 - Talking About Risk and Failure
description: دو کارآفرین درباره پذیرفتن ریسک و یاد گرفتن از شکست صحبت می‌کنند.

sentences.text: Were you ever afraid to start your business?
Of course. The fear of failure was huge.
sentences.translation: البته. ترس از شکست عظیم بود.

sentences.text: I took calculated risks, not reckless ones.
Did you ever experience a real setback?
sentences.translation: هیچ‌وقت با یک شکست واقعی روبه‌رو شدی؟

sentences.text: Yes, my first venture failed completely.
sentences.translation: بله، اولین کسب‌وکارم کاملاً شکست خورد.

sentences.text: It was, but it taught me valuable lessons.
sentences.translation: بود، اما درس‌های ارزشمندی به من داد.

sentences.text: Not at all. Resilience is everything.
It's really about the mindset, isn't it?
sentences.translation: واقعاً به طرز فکر برمی‌گردد، نه؟

sentences.text: Exactly. Embrace failure and you'll grow.
sentences.translation: دقیقاً. شکست را بپذیر و رشد می‌کنی.
